headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Brown & Brown, Lowers Price Target to $60
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $65 to $60.
